name: Confetti Bites
recipeInstructions:
1. Press the dough into a 9 x 13 pan, making sure all seams are sealed.
2. Bake in a 350 oven for 12 - 15 minutes.
3. Combine cream cheese, mayo, basil and garlic.
4. Spread over cooled crust.
5. Top with the fresh vegetables.
6. Sprinkle generously with Salad Supreme.
7. Refrigerate till ready to serve.
8. Cut into small squares and serve.
